name: Malicious Script Execution via SageMaker Lifecycle Config
description: Simulates an attacker backdooring a SageMaker Notebook Instance lifecycle configuration with a malicious OnStart shell script that downloads and executes a payload on every notebook restart.
prerequisites: A SageMaker Notebook Instance lifecycle configuration (created by Pulumi infra)
detection_signal: CloudTrail sagemaker:UpdateNotebookInstanceLifecycleConfig with a base64-encoded OnStart script from an unexpected principal
